  • Architecture
  • Components
  • API Reference
    • API Reference
  • Development
  • Deployment
  • API Reference
  • API Reference

API Reference

Overview​

The Web App API provides endpoints for managing health protocols, timeline entries, and user data.

Base URL: https://suhoxvn8ik.execute-api.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/dev Current Status: Active Development

Authentication​

Current: Development phase - mixed authentication requirements Production Plan: JWT Bearer token authentication

Working Endpoints (19)​

GET /api/v1/protocols​

Description: Get available health protocols
Response Time: 377ms
Status: 200

Response Example:

{
  "protocols": [
    {
      "id": "1495844a-19de-404c-a288-7660eda0cbe1",
      "name": "AIP Core",
      "description": "Autoimmune Protocol - Elimination Phase. Removes nightshades, grains, legumes, dairy, eggs, nuts, seeds, and certain spices.",
      "category": null,
      "phases": null,
      "official": true,
      "version": "1.0"
    },
    {
      "id": "34236e47-3e54-49fa-99a4-797dbcf66c2d",
      "name": "AIP Modified",
      "description": "Modified Autoimmune Protocol with selective reintroductions and personalized modifications.",
      "category": "aip",
      "phases": null,
      "official": false,
      "version": "1.0"
    },
    {
      "id": "b0c3b21c-f32c-4ac4-8afa-251d2819c3c0",
      "name": "Elimination Diet",
      "description": "Systematic food elimination and reintroduction",
      "category": "elimination",
      "phases": null,
      "official": false,
      "version": "1.0"
    },
    {
      "id": "a80be547-6db1-4722-a5a4-60930143a2d9",
      "name": "Low FODMAP",
      "description": "Eliminates fermentable carbohydrates to manage IBS and digestive symptoms.",
      "category": "low_fodmap",
      "phases": null,
      "official": false,
      "version": "1.0"
    },
    {
      "id": "51ca7a24-4691-4629-8ee5-c20876e68c29",
      "name": "Low Histamine",
      "description": "Reduces histamine-rich foods to manage histamine intolerance and allergic reactions.",
      "category": "low_histamine",
      "phases": null,
      "official": false,
      "version": "1.0"
    },
    {
      "id": "fd2c2435-48ea-4d5d-9d04-6fe5b8ac3b0c",
      "name": "Low Lectin",
      "description": "Avoids lectin-rich foods to reduce digestive inflammation and autoimmune triggers.",
      "category": "low_lectin",
      "phases": null,
      "official": false,
      "version": "1.0"
    },
    {
      "id": "12f1d4f1-f56a-48a3-b936-41026014656b",
      "name": "Low Oxalate",
      "description": "Limits oxalate-containing foods to prevent kidney stones and reduce inflammation.",
      "category": "low_oxalate",
      "phases": null,
      "official": false,
      "version": "1.0"
    },
    {
      "id": "40b6955c-fd3b-4aba-846b-03caa7119ff9",
      "name": "No Nightshades",
      "description": "Removes nightshade vegetables to reduce inflammation in sensitive individuals.",
      "category": "no_nightshades",
      "phases": null,
      "official": false,
      "version": "1.0"
    },
    {
      "id": "46de08fb-03bf-4032-b507-122bb934ecb9",
      "name": "Paleo",
      "description": "Paleolithic diet focusing on whole foods, excluding grains, legumes, and processed foods.",
      "category": "paleo",
      "phases": null,
      "official": false,
      "version": "1.0"
    },
    {
      "id": "5cd8f8c7-3cbb-4405-ab88-a253ff7c907b",
      "name": "Whole30",
      "description": "30-day elimination program removing sugar, alcohol, grains, legumes, and dairy.",
      "category": "whole30",
      "phases": null,
      "official": false,
      "version": "1.0"
    }
  ],
  "total": 10
}

Data Structure:

  • protocols: array[10]
  • total: number

GET /api/v1/correlations/insights?userId=8e8a568a-c2f8-43a8-abf2-4e54408dbdc0​

Description: Get AI correlation insights
Response Time: 24678ms
Status: 200

Response Example:

{
  "insights": [
    {
      "type": "food-symptom",
      "trigger": "nightshade foods",
      "effect": "swelling",
      "timeWindow": 72,
      "timeWindowDescription": "within 72 hours",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "frequency": "32/46 times",
      "occurrences": 32,
      "totalOpportunities": 46,
      "description": "nightshade foods appear to trigger swelling within 72 hours",
      "recommendation": "Monitor nightshade foods consumption and swelling symptoms"
    },
    {
      "type": "food-symptom",
      "trigger": "nightshade foods",
      "effect": "joint pain",
      "timeWindow": 72,
      "timeWindowDescription": "within 72 hours",
      "confidence": 0.76,
      "frequency": "35/46 times",
      "occurrences": 35,
      "totalOpportunities": 46,
      "description": "nightshade foods appear to trigger joint pain within 72 hours",
      "recommendation": "Consider avoiding nightshade foods for 2-4 weeks to test sensitivity"

Data Structure:

  • insights: array[117]
  • summary: object
  • timeframe_days: number
  • confidence_threshold: number

GET /api/v1/correlations/insights?userId=8e8a568a-c2f8-43a8-abf2-4e54408dbdc0&confidence_threshold=0.7​

Description: Get filtered correlation insights
Response Time: 24274ms
Status: 200

Data Structure:

  • confidence_threshold: number

GET /api/v1/foods/by-protocol?protocol_id=1495844a-19de-404c-a288-7660eda0cbe1​

Description: Get AIP Core protocol foods
Response Time: 577ms
Status: 200

Response Example:

  "protocol": {
    "id": "1495844a-19de-404c-a288-7660eda0cbe1",

Data Structure:

  • protocol: object
  • foods: array[75]
  • foodsByCategory: object
  • stats: object
  • filters: object
  • categories: array[10]

GET /api/v1/foods/by-protocol?protocol_id=51ca7a24-4691-4629-8ee5-c20876e68c29​

Description: Get Low Histamine protocol foods
Response Time: 76ms
Status: 200

Response Example:

{
  "protocol": {
    "id": "51ca7a24-4691-4629-8ee5-c20876e68c29",
    "name": "Low Histamine",
    "description": "Reduces histamine-rich foods to manage histamine intolerance and allergic reactions.",
    "category": "low_histamine",
    "phases": null,
    "created_by": null,
    "is_global": true,
    "created_at": "2025-06-23T18:39:01.593Z",
    "official": false,
    "version": "1.0",
    "protocol_type": "property_based"
  },
  "foods": [
    {
      "id": "c075f674-d3bb-42bb-a54c-211e9f613367",
      "name": "coffee",
      "category": "beverage",
      "nightshade": false,
      "histamine": "medium",
      "oxalate": "low",
      "lectin": "low",
      "fodmap": "moderate",

  • filters: object
  • categories: array[10]

GET /api/v1/foods/search?search=chicken​

Description: Search foods - chicken
Response Time: 115ms
Status: 200

Response Example:

{
  "foods": [
    {
      "id": "0e90ea7d-0b53-40a5-88bf-d601d056868e",
      "name": "chicken",
      "category": "protein",
      "nightshade": false,
      "histamine": "low",
      "oxalate": "low",
      "lectin": "low",
      "fodmap": "low",
      "salicylate": "low"
    }
  ],
  "total": 1,
  "search_term": "chicken",
  "protocol_id": null
}

Data Structure:

  • foods: array[1]
  • total: number
  • search_term: string
  • protocol_id: object

GET /api/v1/foods/search?search=broccoli&protocol_id=1495844a-19de-404c-a288-7660eda0cbe1​

Description: Search foods with protocol context
Response Time: 61ms
Status: 200

Response Example:

{
  "foods": [
    {
      "id": "8122bede-7996-4bd8-b99b-64cd5eafa73b",
      "name": "broccoli",
      "category": "vegetable",
      "nightshade": false,
      "histamine": "low",
      "oxalate": "low",
      "lectin": "low",
      "fodmap": "moderate",
      "salicylate": "moderate",
      "protocol_type": "rule_based",
      "protocol_category": null,
      "protocol_status": "allowed",
      "protocol_phase": 1,
      "protocol_notes": ""
    }
  ],
  "total": 1,
  "search_term": "broccoli",
  "protocol_id": "1495844a-19de-404c-a288-7660eda0cbe1"
}

Data Structure:

  • foods: array[1]
  • total: number
  • search_term: string
  • protocol_id: string

GET /api/v1/timeline/entries​

Description: Get timeline entries
Response Time: 159ms
Status: 200

Response Example:

{
  "entries": [],
  "total": 0
}

Data Structure:

  • entries: array[0]
  • total: number

GET /api/v1/timeline/entries?date=2025-07-04​

Description: Get timeline entries with date filter
Response Time: 65ms
Status: 200

Response Example:

{
  "entries": [],
  "total": 0
}

Data Structure:

  • entries: array[0]
  • total: number

GET /api/v1/timeline/entries?userId=8e8a568a-c2f8-43a8-abf2-4e54408dbdc0​

Description: Get user timeline entries
Response Time: 60ms
Status: 200

Response Example:

{
  "entries": [],
  "total": 0
}

Data Structure:

  • entries: array[0]
  • total: number

GET /api/v1/users​

Description: Get user data (dev mode: returns demo user)
Response Time: 134ms
Status: 200

Response Example:

{
  "user": {
    "id": "8e8a568a-c2f8-43a8-abf2-4e54408dbdc0",
    "email": "patient@example.com",
    "first_name": "Patient",
    "last_name": "Demo",
    "user_type": "patient",
    "is_active": true
  }
}

Data Structure:

  • user: object

GET /api/v1/user/protocols​

Description: Get user active protocols (dev mode)
Response Time: 65ms
Status: 200

Response Example:

{
  "protocols": []
}

Data Structure:

  • protocols: array[0]

GET /api/v1/user/preferences​

Description: Get user preferences (dev mode)
Response Time: 106ms
Status: 200

Response Example:

{
  "preferences": {}
}

  • preferences: object

GET /api/v1/symptoms/search?search=headache​

Description: Search symptoms
Response Time: 111ms
Status: 200

Response Example:

{
  "symptoms": [
    {
      "id": "ae47b6d3-50b5-4fab-92e4-dae7dac8dc5c",
      "name": "Headache",
      "category": "Pain",
      "description": "Head pain of varying intensity",
      "synonyms": [
        "head pain",
        "cephalgia",
        "migraine"
      ]
    }
  ],
  "total": 1,
  "search_term": "headache"
}

Data Structure:

  • symptoms: array[1]
  • total: number
  • search_term: string

GET /api/v1/supplements/search?search=vitamin​

Description: Search supplements
Response Time: 134ms
Status: 200

Response Example:

{
  "supplements": [
    {
      "id": "d8315e76-4e75-4a9a-9110-f810f20de3bc",
      "name": "Vitamin B12",
      "category": "Vitamin",
      "description": "Supports energy and nervous system",
      "synonyms": [
        "Cobalamin",
        "B-12",
        "Methylcobalamin"
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "5431b865-b707-4c84-8c4e-a5718311f311",
      "name": "Vitamin B6",
      "category": "Vitamin",
      "description": "Supports neurotransmitter production",
      "synonyms": [
        "Pyridoxine",
        "P5P",
        "B-6"
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "7417d9a4-a270-43a7-aab8-db00006e3c9a",
      "name": "Vitamin C",
      "category": "Vitamin",
      "description": "Antioxidant, immune support",
      "synonyms": [
        "Ascorbic Acid",
        "Vit C"
      ]
    },
    {
      "id": "f1c1a738-62b4-4a87-ac1d-448ba0140fac",
      "name": "Vitamin D3",
      "category": "Vitamin",
      "description": "Supports immune function and bone health",
      "synonyms": [
        "Vitamin D",
        "Cholecalciferol",
        "Vit D"
      ]
    }
  ],
  "total": 4,
  "search_term": "vitamin"
}

Data Structure:

  • supplements: array[4]
  • total: number
  • search_term: string

GET /api/v1/detox-types​

Description: Get detox types
Response Time: 113ms
Status: 200

Response Example:

{
  "detox_types": [
    {
      "id": "77637788-25e5-4633-8ef9-d79346afb962",
      "name": "Baking Soda Bath",
      "category": "Bath",
      "duration_suggested": 15,
      "description": "Alkalizing detox bath"
    },
    {
      "id": "58ccd4a4-65f5-4237-8cb8-09d659cd5730",
      "name": "Castor Oil Pack",
      "category": "Topical",
      "duration_suggested": 45,
      "description": "Liver and digestive support"
    },
    {
      "id": "db9b438b-1cf6-4166-9c99-3ca46d1bbd45",
      "name": "Clay Mask",
      "category": "Topical",
      "duration_suggested": 20,
      "description": "Skin detox with bentonite clay"
    },
    {
      "id": "bb8c8edc-a756-4801-b2bd-b637fd8ff305",
      "name": "Coffee Enema",
      "category": "Internal",
      "duration_suggested": 15,
      "description": "Liver detox support"
    },
    {
      "id": "ab731630-95c8-4c2c-b727-40c1eaa65e39",
      "name": "Cold Plunge",
      "category": "Cold",
      "duration_suggested": 5,
      "description": "Cold water immersion therapy"
    },
    {
      "id": "ad8ce13c-8e69-45e2-939b-0c3fdb45cb8c",
      "name": "Dry Brushing",
      "category": "Manual",
      "duration_suggested": 10,
      "description": "Skin and lymphatic stimulation"
    },
    {
      "id": "05d5541d-bb69-4445-a40d-48aa633946b3",
      "name": "Epsom Salt Bath",
      "category": "Bath",
      "duration_suggested": 20,
      "description": "Magnesium sulfate detox bath"
    },
    {
      "id": "dd3355e7-cab8-4f0a-b039-e72e038b4b05",
      "name": "Ice Bath",
      "category": "Cold",
      "duration_suggested": 10,
      "description": "Cold therapy for inflammation"
    },
    {
      "id": "4ca718db-7e7c-4815-97cc-9cef3ae593fc",
      "name": "Infrared Sauna",
      "category": "Heat",
      "duration_suggested": 30,
      "description": "Far infrared heat therapy"
    },
    {
      "id": "9419e769-00ee-415b-8123-7a9ebaf24a6e",
      "name": "Lymphatic Massage",
      "category": "Manual",
      "duration_suggested": 60,
      "description": "Manual lymph drainage"
    }
  ],
  "total": 10,
  "search_term": ""
}

Data Structure:

  • detox_types: array[10]
  • total: number
  • search_term: string

Protected Endpoints (0)​

These endpoints require authentication in production:

Performance Metrics​

  • Average Response Time: 2701ms
  • Success Rate: 100%

Error Handling​

Common HTTP Status Codes​

  • 200: Success
  • 400: Bad Request - Invalid parameters
  • 401: Unauthorized - Authentication required
  • 403: Forbidden - Access denied
  • 404: Not Found - Endpoint or resource not found
  • 500: Internal Server Error

Error Response Format​

{
  "error": "Human readable error message",
  "code": "ERROR_CODE", 
  "status": "error"
}

Rate Limiting​

  • Development: No rate limiting
  • Production: 1000 requests per hour per authenticated user

Testing​

Automated Testing​

# Test all endpoints
npm run analyze-api

Manual Testing​

# Test working endpoints
curl https://suhoxvn8ik.execute-api.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/dev/api/v1/protocols

# Test with authentication (when available)
curl -H "Authorization: Bearer YOUR_TOKEN" \
     https://suhoxvn8ik.execute-api.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/dev/api/v1/user-preferences

API documentation is automatically generated from live endpoint testing.
